g.title: 工作表.108
g.desc: Note: SPORT DIN[3:0] and DOUT[3:0] are multiplexed to connect...
g.text: Note:· SPORT DIN[3:0] and DOUT[3:0] are multiplexed to connect to DIO[3:0] correspondingly.· When connected to external I2S devices, SPORT0/1 can act as master, also as slave.· SPORT0 can be connected to an internal audio codec or an external I2S device, but not both.
